name: Air Handling Unit - Model AHU-5000
description: Variable air volume air handling unit for laboratory spaces
pdf_content:
EQUIPMENT SUBMITTAL
Project: Research Laboratory Building

AIR HANDLING UNIT SPECIFICATIONS
Manufacturer: AirFlow Systems Inc.
Model: AHU-5000-LAB
Type: Draw-through VAV with energy recovery

AIRFLOW PARAMETERS
Supply Air: 5,000 CFM @ 4.0" TSP
Return Air: 4,500 CFM @ 2.0" TSP
Outdoor Air: 1,500 CFM minimum
Exhaust Air: 1,000 CFM
Supply Air Temperature: 55°F

FAN SPECIFICATIONS
Supply Fan: 10 HP, VFD controlled, backward curved plenum
Return Fan: 5 HP, VFD controlled, backward curved plenum
Fan Efficiency Grade: FEG71
Static Efficiency: 65% at design point

FILTRATION
Pre-filter: MERV 8, 2" pleated
Final Filter: MERV 14, 12" rigid cell
HEPA Filter: 99.97% @ 0.3 microns (lab areas only)

COIL SPECIFICATIONS
Cooling Coil: 8-row chilled water, 150 MBH
Heating Coil: 2-row hot water, 75 MBH
Energy Recovery Wheel: 70% sensible effectiveness

CONTROLS INTEGRATION
BACnet MS/TP communication
VFD control via 0-10VDC signal
CO2 monitoring for demand ventilation
Differential pressure monitoring across filters
Supply air temperature reset based on zone demands

COMMISSIONING REQUIREMENTS
1. Balance airflow to within ±5% of design
2. Verify filter pressure drop at clean condition
3. Test VFD operation from 30% to 100% speed
4. Calibrate all temperature and pressure sensors
5. Verify heat recovery wheel effectiveness
6. Test smoke detection and fire/smoke damper operation
7. Perform sound level measurements at design airflow
8. Verify laboratory pressure relationships
9. Test emergency shut-down sequence
10. Document TAB report with all measurements

Submittal Date: January 25, 2024
Page 1 of 4

design_specs.filtration: MERV 8 pre-filter, MERV 14 final, HEPA for labs
